articles.title: Top 5 cryptocurrencies to watch this week: BTC, ADA, EOS, THETA, AAVE
articles.description: Altcoins rallied strongly over the past week, but Bitcoin’s current consolidation could be a sign that the trend may reverse soon.

articles.title: EOS Plummets After Block.one CTO Dan Larimer Resigns
articles.description: Dan Larimer announced his resignation as chief technology officer (CTO) of the crypto company, Block.one. The company is responsible for building an alleged “Ethereum killer” and earned over $4 billion during an ICO promising the same. Larimer: “All Good Things Must Come to an End” In a brief blog post, the Block.one CTO thanked his colleagues and announced that he would be leaving the company to turn to build more censorship-resistant technologies. articles.title: Dan Larimer Announces Departure From EOS Builder Block.One
articles.description: Dan Larimer has left Block.one, the company that raised $4 billion to build the software behind the EOS blockchain.
